ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMINCO INC, CHRISTINA KYIN LEE, DOES 1 THROUGH 10 ON SEP-17-2009 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2009 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 612 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE AS TO LEE, WHO MAY FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY OCTBER 23, 2009, AND SHE IS ORDERED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $678.50 FOR REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED PROCURRING THE DEFAULT AND PURSUING JUDGMNET REMEDIES. THIS ORDER IS FURTHER CONDITIONED ON LEE NOT OPPOSING A REASONABLE REQUEST TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT OR VACATE THE DISMISSAL OF DOES, SHOULD PLAINTIFF SEEK SUCH RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-20-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Raymond Burke, Esq., 415-931-4207, specially appearing for defendant and moving party Christina Lee

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CHRISTINA LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE AS TO LEE, WHO MAY FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY OCTBER 23, 2009, AND SHE IS ORDERED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $678.50 FOR REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED PROCURRING THE DEFAULT AND PURSUING JUDGMNET REMEDIES. THIS ORDER IS FURTHER CONDITIONED ON LEE NOT OPPOSING A REASONABLE REQUEST TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT OR VACATE THE DISMISSAL OF DOES, SHOULD PLAINTIFF SEEK SUCH RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189(301/PJB)
